# Welinq and OVHCloud Partner on Networked Quantum Computing Architectures

OVHcloud, a global cloud player and European leader in trusted cloud infrastructure, is now the first cloud provider and data center operator to partner with Welinq to focus on the deployment of Welinq's networked quantum computing architectures directly within data center environments.

As a statement, Welinq's CEO & cofounder Tom Darras said: "The future of quantum computing will not be decided solely by the power of quantum computers, but by their ability to be networked and orchestrated within computing infrastructures.

OVHcloud, a global cloud player and European leader in trusted cloud infrastructure, is now the first cloud provider and data center operator to partner with Welinq to focus on the deployment of Welinq's networked quantum computing architectures directly withindatacenter environments.

Through this collaboration, OVHcloud and Welinq will explore how networked quantum computing architectures can be deployed and operated inside data centers, combining cloud infrastructure expertise with next-generation quantum networking technologies.

Welinq and Pasqal announce the strengthening of their strategic collaboration to accelerate the development of networked quantum computing based on interconnected neutral-atom quantum processors.

Building on an established collaboration and a shared neutral-atom technology stack, the two companies are now moving into a new phase of rapid implementation, tightly aligning quantum computing and quantum networking to deliver scalable, network-ready quantum architectures designed for deployment in data centers.
Welinq and Pasqal announce the strengthening of their strategic collaboration to accelerate the development of networked quantum computing based on interconnected neutral-atom quantum processors.

The project includes a bilateral industrial partnership between Pasqal and Welinq, alongside a dedicated research collaboration led by Pasqal with the group of Alexei Ourjoumtsev at Collège de France (JEIP), a leading expert in quantum optics and strong light–matter interactions.

occurrence_sentence: This collaboration reaches a new milestone with InterQo, a €4 million, supported by the Île-de-France Region and BPI France through the i-Demo Régionalisé (France 2030) call.
